g.text: 3. MazeSystem asks Algorithm to generate the maze
4. Algorithm links cells inside the Grid
5. MazeSystem creates the Player via EntityFactory
6. MazeSystem places the Player on the Grid
7. MazeSystem finds the stairs position on the Grid
8. MazeSystem creates the Stairs via EntityFactory
9. MazeSystem places the Stairs on the Grid
12. MazeSystem signals Level Ready to Game
